_note: Metal (MoltenVK) gpu-next reference signatures, captured via metal_ref.sh (deterministic paused frame-step) on a static smptehdbars 1280x720 source with the same capture.lua + frame_metrics.py that CI runs on WARP. The tMAD column is ADVISORY only: fp16-RTZ vs fp32 and per-tick grain RNG make magnitudes differ, and a per-present reseed cadence (e.g. filmgrain-match TPL jitter) is not fully exercised by paused frame-step — so a WARP tMAD divergence is a lead to eyeball on real hardware, NOT a build-failing verdict. The hard gate is non-degeneracy (frame_metrics.py exit 2). sstd (spatial structure) is deterministic and self-consistent across platforms.
